prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: PRF-RTD-STD-BL Product Type: PHYSICAL_MOVIE Brand (from catalog): Productive Fitness Products Existing Title: Productive Fitness Strength Resistance Training DVD Description: Are you looking for a way to bring your exercise equipment with you wherever you go?

The Productive Fitness Resistance Training DVD shows you how to workout with resistance bands. Resistance bands are the perfect way to bring your work out gear while you travel without having to go to a gym. This multifunctional DVD contains 35 different resistance training exercises that will tone your entire body.

Work out with the most efficient and fun way possible with the Productive Fitness resistance training DVD. Search Terms: fitness training workout fat burning Features: - 35 Resistance Training Exercises - Dynamic On-Screen Graphics - 3 Complete Work Out Routines - Downloadable Stretching Posters - Downloadable Male or Female Muscle Posters === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Productive Fitness Strength Resistance Training DVD

openai.item_name: Productive Fitness Products Resistance Training DVD

anthropic.title_differentiation: 35 Exercises, 3 Complete Workouts, Full Body Toning, Travel Friendly, Dynamic Graphics

openai.title_differentiation: 35 Resistance Training Exercises, 3 Workout Routines, Dynamic On-Screen Graphics, Downloadable Posters
